name: kommetjie-muay-thai
description: | File | Purpose | |---|---| | `schema.sql` | Run once in Supabase SQL Editor | | `config.js` | Paste your Supabase credentials here | | `app.js` | Shared utilities (do not edit) | | `style.css` | Design system (do not edit) | | `logo.png` | **Add your logo file here** | | `index.html` | Public homepage | | `register.html` | New member registration + indemnity | | `login.html` | OTP login | | `dashboard.html` | Member class booking | | `admin.html` | Admin panel |
